text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I stayed up late last night. But it never
appeared...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Maybe the ghost is just shy?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I wanted to become friends and race
together. It seems like it'd be so much fun.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I mean... 'Cause it floats, y'know? I thought it'd go fwoosh, or something. Ah well... Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara seems to have a hard time getting
sleep. That is a matter of concern.
